requirement_topic.en: Solomon Power / SIEA Grid Connection — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: Solomon Power / SIEA并网——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: Solomon Power / SIEA併網——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Grid-tied solar PV inverters in Solomon Islands should be treated as project-reviewed equipment for Solomon Power, the operating name of the Solomon Islands Electricity Authority (SIEA). The standards route should be confirmed because national standards coverage is limited and project specifications may rely on IEC practice or Australia/New Zealand legacy requirements. Practical evidence normally centers on IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface behavior, and site-specific protection settings for the Solomon Islands 230/400 V, 50 Hz distribution environment.
summary.zh: 在所罗门群岛，并网太阳能光伏逆变器应按Solomon Power（Solomon Islands Electricity Authority，SIEA的运营名称）项目审查设备处理。由于国家标准覆盖有限，且项目规格可能依赖IEC做法或澳新传统要求，标准路径应逐项确认。实际证据通常围绕IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口性能，以及适配所罗门群岛230/400 V、50 Hz配电环境的项目保护设置。
summary.zht: 在索羅門群島，併網太陽能光伏逆變器應按Solomon Power（Solomon Islands Electricity Authority，SIEA的運營名稱）項目審查設備處理。由於國家標準覆蓋有限，且項目規格可能依賴IEC做法或澳紐傳統要求，標準路徑應逐項確認。實際證據通常圍繞IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面性能，以及適配索羅門群島230/400 V、50 Hz配電環境的項目保護設置。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Solomon Power / Solomon Islands Electricity Authority project grid-connection and commissioning requirements
IEC or AS/NZS-derived project specifications where adopted by the owner, engineer, or utility

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408-2021, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are based on Chinese grid conditions and do not automatically transfer to Solomon Power project acceptance. The frequency is the same 50 Hz, but voltage differs: China nominal low voltage is 220/380 V, while Solomon Islands projects should be set for 230/400 V unless the utility or project engineer specifies otherwise.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021及国内防孤岛测试结果。这些文件基于中国电网条件，不会自动转化为Solomon Power项目接受。频率同为50 Hz，但电压不同：中国低压标称为220/380 V，而所罗门群岛项目应按230/400 V设置，除非公用事业或项目工程师另有规定。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021及國內防孤島測試結果。這些文件基於中國電網條件，不會自動轉化為Solomon Power項目接受。頻率同為50 Hz，但電壓不同：中國低壓標稱為220/380 V，而索羅門群島項目應按230/400 V設置，除非公用事業或項目工程師另有規定。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid-connection documents are not automatic evidence for Solomon Power / SIEA approval. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 reports for the exact inverter model or family, document the firmware country profile, and validate voltage, frequency, trip thresholds, reconnection time, and power-quality behavior for a 230/400 V 50 Hz Solomon Islands grid. Do not state that Solomon Islands voltage matches China; only the 50 Hz frequency aligns.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网文件不会自动作为Solomon Power / SIEA批准证据。出口商应为具体逆变器型号或系列准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727报告，记录固件国家/地区配置，并针对所罗门群岛230/400 V 50 Hz电网验证电压、频率、跳闸阈值、重连时间和电能质量表现。不得声称所罗门群岛电压与中国相同；一致的只是50 Hz频率。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網文件不會自動作為Solomon Power / SIEA批准證據。出口商應為具體逆變器型號或系列準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727報告，記錄韌體國家/地區配置，並針對索羅門群島230/400 V 50 Hz電網驗證電壓、頻率、跳脫閾值、重連時間和電能品質表現。不得聲稱索羅門群島電壓與中國相同；一致的只是50 Hz頻率。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific and effectively mandatory for grid-tied connection where Solomon Power / SIEA or the project owner requires utility review; confirm the current connection conditions before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence may support the technical file but is not transferable as Solomon Islands grid-connection acceptance

source.publisher: Solomon Power (Solomon Islands Electricity Authority / SIEA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Solomon Power / SIEA grid connection as a separate project approval gate. Submit IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence and validate firmware for 230/400 V at 50 Hz; Chinese 220/380 V GB/T settings are not a voltage match. Confirm the current utility connection checklist and any AS/NZS-derived project conditions before committing equipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将Solomon Power / SIEA并网视为独立项目审批门槛。提交IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，并按230/400 V、50 Hz验证固件；中国220/380 V GB/T参数并非电压匹配。在确定设备前，请核实现行公用事业接入清单及任何源自AS/NZS的项目条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將Solomon Power / SIEA併網視為獨立項目審批門檻。提交IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，並按230/400 V、50 Hz驗證韌體；中國220/380 V GB/T參數並非電壓匹配。在確定設備前，請核實現行公用事業接入清單及任何源自AS/NZS的項目條件。

requirement_topic.en: Project Context — Pacific SIDS Electrification, Tina River Hydro, Solar Deployment, and Honiara Logistics
requirement_topic.zh: 项目背景——太平洋小岛屿发展中国家电气化、Tina River水电、太阳能部署及霍尼亚拉物流
requirement_topic.zht: 項目背景——太平洋小島嶼發展中國家電氣化、Tina River水電、太陽能部署及霍尼亞拉物流

summary.en: Solomon Islands is a Pacific small island developing state with low electrification outside major centers and a grid-transition context shaped by Solomon Power projects, the Tina River hydropower programme, donor-financed renewable energy work, and growing solar deployment. PV inverter submissions may therefore be reviewed not only against utility interconnection needs but also against project-owner procurement rules, sea-freight constraints via Honiara, spares strategy, and operation in humid, cyclone-exposed, salt-mist coastal environments.
summary.zh: 所罗门群岛是太平洋小岛屿发展中国家，主要中心以外电气化水平较低；电网转型受Solomon Power项目、Tina River水电计划、援助融资可再生能源工作及不断增长的太阳能部署影响。因此，光伏逆变器提交材料不仅可能按公用事业互联要求审查，还可能按项目业主采购规则、经霍尼亚拉海运限制、备件策略，以及高湿、气旋暴露、沿海盐雾环境运行要求审查。
summary.zht: 索羅門群島是太平洋小島嶼發展中國家，主要中心以外電氣化水平較低；電網轉型受Solomon Power項目、Tina River水電計畫、援助融資可再生能源工作及不斷增長的太陽能部署影響。因此，光伏逆變器提交材料不僅可能按公用事業互聯要求審查，還可能按項目業主採購規則、經霍尼亞拉海運限制、備件策略，以及高濕、氣旋暴露、沿海鹽霧環境運行要求審查。

standards_or_laws: Solomon Power renewable energy and network project requirements
Tina River Hydropower Development Project context for Solomon Islands renewable energy transition
Project-owner IEC or AS/NZS-derived procurement specifications
IEC 60068 / IEC 61701-type environmental evidence where requested for humidity, thermal stress, and salt-mist exposure

summary.en: China domestic inverter approvals often focus on factory type testing, domestic grid profiles, and China logistics assumptions. Those documents usually do not prove tropical marine durability, cyclone-area installation suitability, spare-parts availability after sea freight, or firmware settings for isolated island grids. Chinese project references can support experience but should be supplemented with Solomon Islands-specific environmental and logistics evidence.
summary.zh: 中国国内逆变器审批通常侧重工厂型式试验、国内电网配置和中国物流假设。这些文件通常不能证明热带海洋环境耐久性、气旋区域安装适用性、经海运后的备件可得性，或适用于岛屿孤立电网的固件设置。中国项目业绩可作为经验支持，但应补充所罗门群岛特定的环境和物流证据。
summary.zht: 中國國內逆變器審批通常側重工廠型式試驗、國內電網配置和中國物流假設。這些文件通常不能證明熱帶海洋環境耐久性、氣旋區域安裝適用性、經海運後的備件可得性，或適用於島嶼孤立電網的韌體設置。中國項目業績可作為經驗支持，但應補充索羅門群島特定的環境和物流證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: A China-focused compliance package may omit evidence that matters in Solomon Islands projects: tropical humidity operation, salt-mist corrosion resistance, cyclone-area mounting and enclosure assumptions, derating at high ambient temperature, service access, spares, and packaging for sea freight via Honiara. Add environmental test summaries, IP / corrosion rating evidence, project derating calculations, and logistics / warranty support documents to the IEC grid and safety file.
gap.zh: 差距：面向中国的合规包可能遗漏所罗门群岛项目关注的证据：热带高湿运行、盐雾耐腐蚀、气旋区域安装和外壳假设、高环境温度降额、服务可达性、备件，以及经霍尼亚拉海运的包装。应在IEC并网和安全文件基础上增加环境测试摘要、IP / 耐腐蚀等级证据、项目降额计算以及物流/质保支持文件。
gap.zht: 差距：面向中國的合規包可能遺漏索羅門群島項目關注的證據：熱帶高濕運行、鹽霧耐腐蝕、氣旋區域安裝和外殼假設、高環境溫度降額、服務可達性、備件，以及經霍尼亞拉海運的包裝。應在IEC併網和安全文件基礎上增加環境測試摘要、IP / 耐腐蝕等級證據、項目降額計算以及物流/保固支援文件。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific; often mandatory in practice when donor-funded, utility, or owner procurement specifications require environmental suitability and maintainability evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese domestic approvals generally do not address Solomon Islands-specific tropical marine logistics and environmental operating assumptions

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Solomon Islands projects, treat environmental suitability and Honiara-based logistics as part of the practical compliance file. China GB/T inverter certificates do not prove cyclone, humidity, salt-mist, derating, spares, or sea-freight readiness. Confirm project-owner procurement language before finalising the technical file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对所罗门群岛项目，应将环境适用性和以霍尼亚拉为节点的物流纳入实际合规文件。中国GB/T逆变器证书不能证明气旋、高湿、盐雾、降额、备件或海运准备情况。在最终确定技术文件前，请确认项目业主采购条款。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對索羅門群島項目，應將環境適用性和以霍尼亞拉為節點的物流納入實際合規文件。中國GB/T逆變器證書不能證明氣旋、高濕、鹽霧、降額、備件或海運準備情況。在最終確定技術文件前，請確認項目業主採購條款。
